svg.title: MedLynq tech stack recommendation
svg.text: Pick the boring tool that fits. Green = recommended. Dashed = considered alternative. Each row has a one-line reason.

g.text: CameraX for capture · MLKit for OCR
CameraX · Image capture + QR ML Kit
TanStack Table · big patient lists with virtual scroll
react-pdf-renderer · packet PDF generation in browser preview
Cmd K palette + Ask Lynq input via Vercel AI SDK
Best ecosystem for ML / LLM tooling
Polyglot is fine — services are gRPC/HTTP
than FastAPI · admin pages are nice
Revisit for hot paths after PMF.
Cheaper than API at our query volume
Doctor Co-pilot, Ask Lynq RAG chains)
Trained in Jupyter · served via FastAPI
AWS S3 Mumbai or Wasabi for cheaper egress
Self-host on AWS · cheap at our scale
SQS: durable job queue for workers
portal scrape — all queued, not sync
EKS for services · Fargate for jobs
Atlas or Liquibase for DB migrations
Sentry for app errors + session replay
• Auth0 or Clerk (or self-host Ory) for user identity
• PII strip pipeline before any LLM call
• Consent ledger before any data share
• HAPI FHIR validator in build pipeline
• ICD-10 + HBP + IH code masters synced
• Apply for NHCX sandbox by Month 3

svg.text: 8 · Estimated monthly run cost (year 1 · 10 hospitals · 50k claims/mo)

g.text: Boring stack on purpose. No experimental choices on critical paths. Every component has a healthy hiring pool in India. Migration cost low for first 12 months — easy to swap pieces.
